description_long: This is a high-performance BMW M4 coupe race car, featuring a low, aerodynamic body with a prominent rear wing and aggressive front splitter. The exterior is predominantly white with striking blue, red, and black racing stripes, and adorned with sponsor logos such as H&R and MAHLE. The car has a wide stance, flared wheel arches, and large black racing wheels with low-profile tires. The roof and hood display the BMW M Power branding, while the side windows are sleek and slightly tinted. The rear of the car is equipped with a large diffuser and dual exhausts, emphasizing its racing pedigree. The overall design is optimized for speed, downforce, and visual impact, making it a standout in any urban or racing environment.
description: A white BMW M4 coupe race car with blue, red, and black racing stripes, large rear wing, and sponsor decals. Its aggressive, aerodynamic design and wide stance highlight its racing purpose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive grille, BMW M Power branding on the hood, and aerodynamic front splitter.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the H&R sponsor logo, flared wheel arches, and large rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent rear wing, diffuser, dual exhausts, and BMW M Power branding on the trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible sponsor logos, wide wheels, and aerodynamic bodywork.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
